name: pr_cep_c_upd_win_noop
_finding: CEP E2 item C §1a (D-139): windowed count() over TWO source events, no-op tag update of one. count() has no binding ⇒ empty windowed watch mask ⇒ NO re-fire (count stays 2). Was xfail (engine re-folded → W2 W2). Same root as pr_cep_c_upd_win_live but with a multi-member accumulate and no expiry advance.
drl: rule W2 when accumulate( E0(tag == "y") over window:time(200ms); $c : count() ) then end
